seo-audit: Review this page/component for SEO. Check meta tags, semantic HTML, schema markup, and keyword opportunities.
perf-check: Analyze performance: Core Web Vitals, GSAP animations, asset optimization, and lazy loading opportunities.
conversion-review: Does this convert? Analyze first impression, CTA clarity, content flow, and mobile experience.
pre-deploy: Run pre-deploy checklist: Lighthouse scores, accessibility, meta tags, sitemap, and mobile validation.
